title: maker_output
description: What the demo-video maker reports after one iteration: the canonical demo-video deliverables plus the kitsoki-ui-qa inputs it authored.

summary.description: One-line summary of what was produced or refreshed this iteration (and what prior feedback it addressed).

video_path.description: Path to the CANONICAL watch-speed MP4 (e.g. .artifacts/<slug>/<slug>.mp4). Never a *.fast.mp4 / *.SHORT-*.mp4 / *.webm — those are the down-named under-dwelled artifacts the gate rejects.

frames_dir.description: Directory holding the per-scene NN-*.png frames (>=1 png).

feature_md_path.description: Path to the feature.md the maker authored — the change being demoed, as the qa.sh --feature input.

scenarios_path.description: Path to the scenarios.yaml the maker authored — one observable on-screen claim per step, as the qa.sh --scenarios input.
